intro: With every adventure, hope for a safer world grows.
description:
Forgotten lands and ancient magic give rise to a dangerous journey against the oppressive rule of witches.

“Legendary Tales V. Price of Power” is an adventure game in the Hidden Objects genre, with plenty of mini-games and puzzles, unforgettable characters, and complicated quests.

In a world ruled by witches, survival is hard and hope is rare. Whispers of forgotten myths and powers suggest that change may still be possible. From hidden catacombs to long-abandoned cities, this journey unfolds across ruins of lost civilizations and through encounters with dangerous foes. Along the way, unlikely allies appear, old secrets resurface, and the fragile dream of freedom grows stronger. The journey is filled with uncertainty, but each discovery hints that the world’s fate may yet be rewritten. Thus, a story of magic, struggle, the search for safety, and the creation of a new future takes shape.

- Gather old friends to overcome hardships together
- Travel through incredible places no one ever believed existed
- Solve puzzles and play mini-games to put your wits to the test
- Examine locations carefully and find every collectible
- Join the battle for freedom alongside your favorite characters
